uniqueFaqs.a: The sedan fare starts at approximately ₹1,080. SUV fare starts at ₹1,540. Fares include driver bata and fuel. Toll and parking charges are extra.

uniqueFaqs.q: Is night drop taxi available from Mahe?
uniqueFaqs.a: Yes, DropTaxi operates 24/7 from Mahe. Night bookings between 10 PM and 6 AM are available with verified, experienced drivers for safe travel.

uniqueFaqs.a: We offer AC Sedan (Etios/Dzire), SUV (Innova/Ertiga), and Tempo Traveller for group bookings. All vehicles are well-maintained and GPS-tracked.

uniqueFaqs.q: How do I book a one way taxi from Mahe?
uniqueFaqs.a: Call 063838 83922 or WhatsApp us with your pickup point in Mahe, drop destination, travel date, and car preference. You will get instant fare confirmation.

uniqueFaqs.q: Can I book a drop taxi from Mahe to Kannur?
uniqueFaqs.a: Yes, Mahe to Kannur is a popular route. The distance is approximately 50 km and takes about 1.0 hours. Book via call or WhatsApp for best rates.
